messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Build a PowerPoint presentation titled 'EdTech Product Demo' for school administrators and teachers. The deck needs 11 slides designed with a playful theme incorporating cartoonish elements and bright colors. Use French for all content and set the slide size to 4:3 Standard orientation. Save it as edtech_demo.pptx. You are not allowed to use external APIs or web scraping. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Furthermore, any attempt to set text on a title shape must first check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

COLORS = {
    "coral": RGBColor(255, 107, 107),
    "teal": RGBColor(78, 205, 196),
    "yellow": RGBColor(255, 230, 109),
    "purple": RGBColor(155, 93, 229),
    "green": RGBColor(0, 245, 212),
    "pink": RGBColor(241, 91, 181),
    "navy": RGBColor(44, 62, 80),
    "white": RGBColor(255, 255, 255),
    "light_gray": RGBColor(245, 245, 245),
    "dark_bg": RGBColor(30, 40, 60),
}

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_PRIMARY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = font_name
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    card_bg = bg_color or COLORS["white"]
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = card_bg
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.25), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title
    run_title.font.size = Pt(18)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY
    run_title.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(1.0), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(1.2))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_body = p_body.add_run()
    run_body.text = body
    run_body.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_body.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    run_body.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, y_position):
    box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(0.5), y_position, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4))
    box.fill.solid()
    box.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLORS["teal"]
    box.line.fill.background()
    tf = box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = label_text
    run.font.size = Pt(12)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["white"]
    run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(8.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.4))
    tf = box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = str(page_number)
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLORS["light_gray"]
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = COLORS["teal"]
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.15), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Zone d'image"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]


def add_decorative_circle(slide, left, top, size, color):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_decorative_star(slide, left, top, size, color):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.STAR_5_POINT, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_banner(slide, text, y_position):
    banner = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CURVED_LEFT_ARROW, Inches(0.5), y_position, Inches(9), Inches(1.2))
    banner.fill.solid()
    banner.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLORS["coral"]
    banner.line.fill.background()
    tf = banner.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(28)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["white"]
    run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY


def slide_1_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8F0")

    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(7.5), Inches(-0.5), Inches(2.5), COLORS["yellow"])
    add_decorative_star(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6), COLORS["teal"])
    add_decorative_star(slide, Inches(8.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(0.5), COLORS["purple"])
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(-0.3), Inches(4.5), Inches(1.5), COLORS["pink"])

    add_banner(slide, "EdTech Product Demo", Inches(0.8))

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(2.0), Inches(2.6), Inches(6), Inches(1.0))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "EdTech Product Demo"
    run.font.size = Pt(44)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]
    run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY

    subtitle_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(2.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.6))
    tf_sub = subtitle_box.text_frame
    p_sub = tf_sub.paragraphs[0]
    run_sub = p_sub.add_run()
    run_sub.text = "Une solution innovante pour les écoles et enseignants"
    run_sub.font.size = Pt(20)
    run_sub.font.color.rgb = COLORS["teal"]

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_2_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F0F8FF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Sommaire"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    items = [
        ("1", "Le problème actuel"),
        ("2", "Notre solution"),
        ("3", "Fonctionnalités clés"),
        ("4", "Démonstration du produit"),
        ("5", "Statistiques et résultats"),
        ("6", "Témoignages"),
        ("7", "Plans tarifaires"),
    ]

    colors_list = [COLORS["coral"], COLORS["teal"], COLORS["purple"], COLORS["yellow"], COLORS["green"], COLORS["pink"], COLORS["navy"]]

    for i, (num, item) in enumerate(items):
        y = Inches(1.3 + i * 0.75)
        circle = add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(0.8), y, Inches(0.45), colors_list[i])
        tf_c = circle.text_frame
        p_c = tf_c.paragraphs[0]
        run_c = p_c.add_run()
        run_c.text = num
        run_c.font.size = Pt(16)
        run_c.font.bold = True
        run_c.font.color.rgb = COLORS["white"]

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), y + Inches(0.03), Inches(7), Inches(0.45), item, font_size=20, color=COLORS["navy"])

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def slide_3_problem(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8F0")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Le problème actuel"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.5), Inches(5.5),
                 "Les enseignants et administrateurs scolaires font face à de nombreux défis :\n\n"
                 "- Gestion manuelle des notes et absences\n"
                 "- Communication difficile avec les parents\n"
                 "- Manque d'outils numériques intégrés\n"
                 "- Perte de temps dans les tâches administratives\n"
                 "- Difficulté à suivre la progression des élèves",
                 font_size=18, color=COLORS["navy"])

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/problem_illustration.png", Inches(5.2), Inches(1.0), Inches(4.3), Inches(5.5))

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_4_solution(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F0FFF0")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Notre solution"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(7), Inches(0.8),
                 "Une plateforme complète conçue pour simplifier la vie scolaire",
                 font_size=20, color=COLORS["teal"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    features = [
        ("Gestion intelligente", "Automatisez les tâches administratives et concentrez-vous sur l'essentiel."),
        ("Communication unifiée", "Connectez enseignants, élèves et parents en temps réel."),
        ("Analytique avancée", "Suivez la progression des élèves avec des tableaux de bord interactifs."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(features):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(2.4), Inches(2.9), Inches(3.5), title, body, COLORS["white"], COLORS["teal"])

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_5_features1(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8F0")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Fonctionnalités clés (1/2)"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    features = [
        ("Tableau de bord personnalisé", "Interface adaptée à chaque utilisateur : administrateur, enseignant ou parent."),
        ("Gestion des emplois du temps", "Créez et gérez les horaires avec glisser-déposer intuitif."),
        ("Bibliothèque numérique", "Accédez à des milliers de ressources pédagogiques intégrées."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(features):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.4), Inches(2.9), Inches(5.0), title, body, COLORS["white"], COLORS["coral"])

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_6_features2(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F0F8FF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Fonctionnalités clés (2/2)"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    features = [
        ("Système de messagerie", "Échangez des messages sécurisés avec les parents et collègues."),
        ("Suivi des absences", "Enregistrez et analysez les absences en temps réel."),
        ("Rapports automatiques", "Générez des rapports détaillés pour chaque élève."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(features):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.4), Inches(2.9), Inches(5.0), title, body, COLORS["white"], COLORS["purple"])

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def slide_7_demo(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8F0")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Démonstration du produit"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/demo_screenshot.png", Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(6.5), Inches(4.8))

    desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(7.3), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.5), Inches(5.0))
    tf_d = desc_box.text_frame
    p_d = tf_d.paragraphs[0]
    run_d = p_d.add_run()
    run_d.text = "Découvrez notre interface intuitive conçue pour simplifier la gestion scolaire au quotidien."
    run_d.font.size = Pt(16)
    run_d.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def slide_8_stats(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F0FFF0")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Statistiques et résultats"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    chart_data = XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data_obj = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data_obj.categories = ["2021", "2022", "2023", "2024"]
    chart_data_obj.add_series("Écoles actives", (15, 42, 78, 120))
    chart_data_obj.add_series("Utilisateurs (milliers)", (5, 18, 45, 92))

    left = Inches(1.0)
    top = Inches(1.3)
    width = Inches(8.0)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_data_obj.chart_type if hasattr(chart_data_obj, 'chart_type') else XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data_obj)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def slide_9_testimonials(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8F0")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Témoignages"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    testimonials = [
        ("Marie Dupont, Enseignante", "Cette plateforme a transformé ma façon d'enseigner. Je gagne un temps précieux chaque semaine."),
        ("Jean Martin, Directeur", "La communication avec les parents s'est considérablement améliorée depuis l'adoption de notre solution."),
    ]

    for i, (author, quote) in enumerate(testimonials):
        x = Inches(0.5 + i * 4.8)
        card_bg = COLORS["white"] if i == 0 else COLORS["light_gray"]
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.3), Inches(4.2), Inches(4.5), author, quote, card_bg, COLORS["teal"])

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def slide_10_pricing(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F0F8FF")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Plans tarifaires"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    plans = [
        ("Basique", "15€/mois\n- Accès aux fonctionnalités de base\n- Support par email\n- 50 utilisateurs max"),
        ("Professionnel", "35€/mois\n- Toutes les fonctionnalités\n- Support prioritaire\n- Utilisateurs illimités"),
        ("Entreprise", "Sur devis\n- Personnalisation complète\n- Formation incluse\n- SLA garanti"),
    ]

    plan_colors = [COLORS["teal"], COLORS["coral"], COLORS["purple"]]

    for i, (name, details) in enumerate(plans):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.2)
        header_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, Inches(1.4), Inches(2.9), Inches(6.0))
        header_box.fill.solid()
        header_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLORS["white"]
        header_box.line.color.rgb = plan_colors[i]
        header_box.line.width = Pt(3)

        name_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.2), Inches(1.6), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.8))
        tf_n = name_box.text_frame
        p_n = tf_n.paragraphs[0]
        run_n = p_n.add_run()
        run_n.text = name
        run_n.font.size = Pt(24)
        run_n.font.bold = True
        run_n.font.color.rgb = plan_colors[i]

        details_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), Inches(2.6), Inches(2.3), Inches(4.5))
        tf_d = details_box.text_frame
        p_d = tf_d.paragraphs[0]
        run_d = p_d.add_run()
        run_d.text = details
        run_d.font.size = Pt(14)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def slide_11_thankyou(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8F0")

    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(7.5), Inches(-0.3), Inches(2.0), COLORS["yellow"])
    add_decorative_star(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.5), Inches(0.5), COLORS["teal"])
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(-0.3), Inches(4.0), Inches(1.2), COLORS["pink"])

    banner = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CURVED_LEFT_ARROW, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(7), Inches(1.0))
    banner.fill.solid()
    banner.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLORS["coral"]
    banner.line.fill.background()

    thank_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(2.0), Inches(3.2), Inches(6), Inches(0.8))
    tf_t = thank_box.text_frame
    p_t = tf_t.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_t.add_run()
    run_t.text = "Merci de votre attention !"
    run_t.font.size = Pt(40)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    contact_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(2.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(5), Inches(1.5))
    tf_c = contact_box.text_frame
    p_c = tf_c.paragraphs[0]
    run_c = p_c.add_run()
    run_c.text = "Contactez-nous : contact@edtech-demo.fr\nTéléphone : +33 1 23 45 67 89"
    run_c.font.size = Pt(18)
    run_c.font.color.rgb = COLORS["teal"]

    add_footer(slide, 11)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_1_title(prs)
    slide_2_agenda(prs)
    slide_3_problem(prs)
    slide_4_solution(prs)
    slide_5_features1(prs)
    slide_6_features2(prs)
    slide_7_demo(prs)
    slide_8_stats(prs)
    slide_9_testimonials(prs)
    slide_10_pricing(prs)
    slide_11_thankyou(prs)

    prs.save("edtech_demo.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
